instructions: Copy this file into workspace/REFERENCES.json before tracking project references.
Use collectionTargets for assets you still need to gather and assets for real supplied, approved, or generated materials.
Replace every placeholder ID, path, note, and purpose with project-specific data.

collectionTargets.title: REPLACE WITH TARGET TITLE
collectionTargets.notes: Replace with what this target should help define or verify.

assets.influence: Replace with how this asset should influence the project.
assets.notes: Replace with evaluation notes or why the asset matters.
